title: FAIL fixture: declares family_match_invariant=false, witnesses miss two families, granularity crosscut pair mismatched
_fixture_purpose: Negative fixture exercising multiple validator gates. Declares family_match_invariant=false (contradicts independent recomputation on S_9), omits Lucas and Ninbonacci from witnesses (violates >=5 families present), and declares a norm_without_family pair that actually is same-family (self-contradictory granularity claim). Validator must flag ORA_INV_FAM, ORA_WIT, ORA_GRAN.
source_attribution: Negative fixture for [256] self-test. GLM-5 arXiv:2602.15763.
